events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing hanger nails constitute a **fail** — Simpson connectors are only load-rated when every specified hole is filled with the listed fastener type, so empty holes leave the connector under-capacity relative to its catalog/ESR rating and IRC's fastening requirements (R502.6, R602.3). Since this is at rough-complete stage (pre-cover), the corrective action is straightforward: fill all missing holes with the correct fastener and re-inspect before allowing cover.
